title: solanum ferox var. lasiocarpum
intro: Solanum ferox var. lasiocarpum, also known as the prickly nightshade, is a perennial plant native to New Zealand, characterized by its thorny stems and purple flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and relieve pain. The health benefits of Solanum ferox var. lasiocarpum include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and its berries can be used to make a decoction, which is used to treat various ailments.
